# Code Anchors: Taxonomy Filing Gate

- `.claude/commands/nxs.distill.md` — filing and the three-way gate live entirely in the drain prompt (no application code): Phase 2 reads the registry as a closed rubric list, Phase 3 writes each created page's best-fit domain and the clear/forced flag, and Phases 6.1–6.2 raise the gate for forced fits and author an approved domain or subdomain onto the branch.
